name: insertTable
description: Inserts an empty table with the specified number of rows and columns at a character index in the document.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

rows.description: Number of rows for the new table.

columns.description: Number of columns for the new table.

index.description: 1-based character index within the document body. Use readDocument with format='json' to inspect indices.

tabId.description: The ID of the specific tab to insert into. Use listDocumentTabs to get tab IDs. If not specified, inserts into the first tab.
